body.name: maxArea

body.focus: left, right = 0, len(height) - 1

value.focus: left, right = 0, len(height) - 1

body.focus: max_area = 0

value.focus: max_area = 0

body.focus: area = min(height[left], height[right]) * (right - left)

value.focus: area = min(height[left], height[right]) * (right - left)
height[left]
height[right]

body.focus: max_area = max(max_area, area)

value.focus: max_area = max(max_area, area)
height[left]
height[right]

body.focus: left += 1

value.focus: left += 1
right -= 1

body.focus: return max_area

value.focus: return max_area
